rule.name: App Transport Security Allows Arbitrary Loads
rule.rule_desc: Detects ATS configuration that allows unrestricted cleartext or weak transport.
rule.vuln_desc: Disabling ATS protections can expose traffic to interception and man-in-the-middle attacks.
rule.developer: Keep ATS enabled and define minimal domain exceptions only when strictly required.
rule.reviewer: Review Info.plist ATS entries and validate that all exceptions are justified and limited.

rule.name: Insecure URL Scheme Registration
rule.rule_desc: Detects custom URL scheme declarations that may require deep-link validation checks.
rule.vuln_desc: Improper deep-link validation can allow unauthorized app actions or data exposure.
rule.developer: Validate all deep-link parameters, enforce allowlists, and avoid sensitive actions without auth checks.
rule.reviewer: Assess deep-link handlers for authentication, authorization, and input validation.

rule.name: Application Queries Schemes Broad Allowlist
rule.rule_desc: Detects URL scheme query allowlists in Info.plist.
rule.vuln_desc: Overly broad query scheme allowlists may increase app fingerprinting and data exposure risks.
rule.developer: Restrict queried URL schemes to only those required for business functionality.
rule.reviewer: Ensure scheme allowlist entries are minimal and justified.

rule.name: Keychain Accessibility Too Permissive
rule.rule_desc: Detects keychain entries with permissive accessibility settings.
rule.vuln_desc: Overly permissive keychain accessibility can expose secrets when device security state is weaker.
rule.developer: Use stricter keychain accessibility (for example, WhenUnlocked or AfterFirstUnlock variants as required).
rule.reviewer: Check keychain storage options for least-privilege accessibility settings.

rule.name: UserDefaults Used for Sensitive Data
rule.rule_desc: Detects UserDefaults storage usage which may be inappropriate for secrets.
rule.vuln_desc: Storing secrets in UserDefaults can expose credentials or tokens through backups or local extraction.
rule.developer: Store sensitive values in Keychain and apply encryption for high-risk data.
rule.reviewer: Verify that tokens, passwords, and keys are not persisted in UserDefaults.

rule.name: WebView JavaScript Enabled for Dynamic Content
rule.rule_desc: Detects explicit JavaScript enablement in embedded web views.
rule.vuln_desc: Unsafe web view configurations can increase XSS-style abuse and local data access risk.
rule.developer: Disable JavaScript unless required and enforce strict navigation/content policies.
rule.reviewer: Review web view usage for script injection risk and trusted-content restrictions.

rule.name: Certificate Validation Override
rule.rule_desc: Detects custom TLS challenge handling that may weaken certificate validation.
rule.vuln_desc: Improper challenge handling can bypass TLS trust and enable MITM attacks.
rule.developer: Use system trust evaluation and pinning patterns where appropriate; avoid unconditional trust.
rule.reviewer: Inspect challenge handlers to confirm strict certificate and host validation logic.

category.name: Platform-Specific Issues - iOS Build and Entitlements

rule.name: Debug Logging in Production Code Paths
rule.rule_desc: Detects debug logging statements that may leak runtime internals or sensitive data.
rule.vuln_desc: Verbose logs can disclose user data, API details, and security-relevant internals.
rule.developer: Gate debug logging by build configuration and redact sensitive values.
rule.reviewer: Check logging behavior for production builds and sensitive-data exposure.

rule.name: Associated Domains Entitlement Present
rule.rule_desc: Detects associated domains entitlement that requires strict domain ownership and validation.
rule.vuln_desc: Misconfigured universal links may enable unintended app routing or phishing workflows.
rule.developer: Configure only trusted domains and validate universal-link handling logic securely.
rule.reviewer: Verify entitlement scope and universal-link validation/authorization checks.

rule.name: Push Notification Entitlement Enabled
rule.vuln_desc: Push workflows can expose sensitive data if payload validation and notification handling are weak.
rule.developer: Ensure notification payloads avoid secrets and enforce secure action handling on receipt.
rule.reviewer: Review push handlers for sensitive data exposure and authorization checks.
